items.name: _hjAbsoluteSessionInProgress
items.purpose: Stores a true or false value for Hotjar to know whether it's the current users first page view. Statistics.

items.name: _hjFirstSeen
items.purpose: Stores a true or false value for Hotjar to know whether it's seeing the user for the first time. Statistics.

items.name: _hjIncludedInPageviewSample
items.purpose: Stores a true or false value for Hotjar to know whether the user's data should be included in the data sampling defined by the site's daily page view limit. Statistics.

items.name: _hjIncludedInSessionSample
items.purpose: Stores a true or false value for Hotjar to know whether the user's data should be included in the data sampling defined by the site's daily session limit. Statistics.

items.name: _hjSession
items.purpose: Stores session data so requests in the session window are attributes to the same session. Statistics.

items.name: _hjSessionUser
items.purpose: Stores the current user's Hotjar user ID so Hotjar can track user's behavior. Statistics.

items.name: ac_client_batch
items.purpose: Stores a list of the session's event IDs to avoid sending duplicate events to Analytics Cloud. Statistics.

items.name: ac_client_channel_id
items.purpose: Stores the Channel ID of the current website the user is accessing to send to Analytics Cloud. Statistics.

items.name: ac_client_context
items.purpose: Stores a list of page and user properties to send to Analytics Cloud so event analysis can have necessary context. Statistics.

items.name: ac_client_identity
items.purpose: Stores the current user's Analytics Cloud user ID (SHA-256 hash generated with the user's email and userId) so users with accounts can be tracked by Analytics Cloud as known individuals. Statistics.

items.name: ac_client_previous_email_address_hash
items.purpose: Stores the email ID of the last user to log in (SHA-256 hash) to identify whether the last user to log in is the same as the previous user and assign events from current session's anonymous browsing to this user. Statistics.

items.name: ac_client_storage_version
items.purpose: Stores the current version of internal storage settings so the locally stores data structure can be compatible with the current version of the browser. Statistics.

items.name: ac_client_user_id
items.purpose: Stores the current user's Analytics Cloud user ID so guest users can be tracked by Analytics Cloud as anonymous individuals and properly segmented. Statistics.

items.name: ac_message_queue
items.purpose: Stores an array of events that haven't yet been sent to Analytics Cloud so they can be sent when possible. Statistics.

items.name: ac_message_queue_identity
items.purpose: Stores an array of identities that haven't yet been sent to Analytics Cloud so they can be sent when possible. Statistics.
